# Units

<!-- source: PDF p.37 -->

## Basic attributes

<!-- p.38 -->

## Special abilities

<!-- p.38 -->

## Unit classes

<!-- p.40 -->

## Additional abilities

<!-- p.40 -->

## XP: Experience points

<!-- p.41 -->

## Heroic abilities

<!-- p.41 -->

## Afflictions

<!-- p.41 -->

## Recruiting units

<!-- p.42 -->

### Recruitment costs

<!-- p.42 -->

#### Recruitment restrictions

<!-- p.42 -->

## Army Setup

<!-- p.43 -->

### Garrison units

<!-- p.43 -->

### Squads

<!-- p.43 -->

### Battle position

<!-- p.44 -->

### Battle Orders

<!-- p.44 -->

#### General orders

<!-- p.44 -->

#### Target orders

<!-- p.45 -->

### Commander orders

<!-- p.45 -->

#### Specific orders

<!-- p.46 -->

#### General orders

<!-- p.46 -->

## Unit Inventories

<!-- p.46 -->

### Magic gem inventory

<!-- p.46 -->


::: callout-note
Transcription pending.
:::
